management.title: Library Management
management.createFirst: Click "Create" to add your first library

page.title: Library
page.noLibrarySelected: Select a library from the sidebar
page.emptyScanHint: No videos in this library. Go to Library Management to start a scan.

dialog.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete library "{{name}}"? This will not delete files on disk, but will remove the library and video records from the database.
dialog.scanPathsHint: Show 3 fixed path inputs. Path 1 is required, paths 2-3 are optional.
